en_title: Sony Confirms PlayStation Plus Monthly Games for July 2026, Headlined by Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 3
cn_title: 索尼公布7月PlayStation Plus会免：《使命召唤：现代战争3》领衔
subtitle: 现代战争上桌
opus_summary: 索尼确认2026年7月PlayStation Plus月度游戏阵容，包括2023年版《使命召唤：现代战争3》《For the King 2》和《CrossCode》。三款游戏将于7月7日至8月3日开放领取。

paragraphs.en: Sony has confirmed the PlayStation Plus monthly games lineup for July 2026 — and it includes Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 3.
paragraphs.cn: 索尼已经确认2026年7月PlayStation Plus月度游戏阵容，其中包括《使命召唤：现代战争3》。

paragraphs.en: This is, of course, the Modern Warfare that launched in 2023 (not the one from back in 2011) that received a rough reception from fans and critics, with particular criticism for its story campaign. It launched just a year after 2022's Modern Warfare 2, an annual release strategy that publisher Activision has said it will no longer continue.
paragraphs.cn: 当然，这里指的是2023年推出的那款《现代战争》（不是2011年的那款）。它当时在玩家和媒体中反响不佳，尤其是剧情战役受到批评。它距离2022年的《现代战争2》只隔了一年发售，而发行商Activision已经表示不会再继续这种年货式发行策略。

paragraphs.en: IGN's Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 3 campaign review returned a 4/10 score, and branded the game as "underbaked, rehashed, and cobbled together from multiplayer parts." Still, its inclusion here is timely — allowing you to zip through its story in preparation for this year's Modern Warfare 4, due out on October 23.
paragraphs.cn: IGN对《使命召唤：现代战争3》战役的评测给出了4/10分，并称其「欠火候、重复利用素材，而且像是用多人模式零件拼凑起来的」。不过，它此时加入会免也算及时：你可以快速通关剧情，为今年10月23日发售的《现代战争4》做准备。

paragraphs.en: Two other titles join July's monthly additions, which will all become available to subscribers from next Tuesday, July 7, until Monday, August 3.
paragraphs.cn: 另外两款游戏也会加入7月月度阵容，所有游戏都将从下周二7月7日起面向订阅用户开放，直到8月3日星期一。

paragraphs.en: Next up is For the King 2, the tactical role-playing game sequel that launched on PC back in 2023 to a generally positive response, though a mixed 6/10 review from IGN . Inspired by tabletop combat, the game features roguelite elements and a procedurally generated map to explore, as you hunt down an evil queen.
paragraphs.cn: 接下来是《For the King 2》，这款战术RPG续作早在2023年登陆PC时总体反响不错，不过IGN给出了褒贬不一的6/10分评价。游戏受桌面战斗启发，带有Roguelite元素，并提供程序生成地图供玩家探索，让你追猎邪恶女王。

paragraphs.en: Finally, there's CrossCode, a retro-inspired 2D action JRPG with 16-bit-style visuals that blends old school video game dungeon adventuring with RPG battling and loot.
paragraphs.cn: 最后是《CrossCode》，这是一款复古风格2D动作JRPG，采用16位视觉风格，将老派电子游戏式地下城冒险与RPG战斗、战利品结合在一起。

paragraphs.en: The full lineup lies below for you to browse in list form:
paragraphs.cn: 完整阵容如下，可供按列表查看：
